title: 无标题文章
summary: I don't use the Compose BOM, and I don't think you should either. The advantages it claims to provide are less than it actually does. Let's defuse the Compose BOM. https:// jakewharton.com/defuse-the-com pose-bom/
content:
I don't use the Compose BOM, and I don't think you should either. The advantages it claims to provide are less than it actually does. Let's defuse the Compose BOM.

https://jakewharton.com/defuse-the-compose-bom/
